shortDescription: Spacious 4-bedroom detached home on a quiet street in Cabbagetown with mature trees and a private backyard.
fullDescription: Welcome to 72 Winchester Street in the vibrant Cabbagetown neighbourhood. This beautifully presented detached home offers generous living space across multiple levels. The main living area boasts an open-concept design with pot lights and a cosy gas fireplace. The kitchen offers ample counter space, premium fixtures, and a convenient eat-in dining area. The 4 bedrooms are well-proportioned, with the primary suite featuring a walk-in closet and updated ensuite. Building amenities include a fitness centre, rooftop terrace, party room, and 24-hour concierge. Transit, cycling infrastructure, and the best of Toronto’s cultural scene are right at your doorstep.
keyFeatures: Fenced yard ideal for children and pets
Close to waterfront trails and cycling paths
Renovated galley kitchen with breakfast bar
